SQLite via better-sqlite3 as the local database for the Electron kiosk
rationale: better-sqlite3 synchronous API is the correct model for the Electron Main process — avoids async complexity and potential deadlocks with ipcMain.handle. Zero operational overhead (single file in userData). WAL mode + foreign keys for crash recovery and data integrity. Schema is relational (sessions reference tariffs, sync_queue references sessions) — a key-value store would require manual join logic. tariff_snapshot stored as JSON TEXT on sessions table decouples audit from tariff mutations. All money as INTEGER cents, timestamps as UTC TEXT. Alternatives rejected: IndexedDB (wrong process, non-relational), LevelDB/lowdb (no transactions, no relational queries), Prisma (binary hell with electron-builder, unjustified for 4 tables), Drizzle (overhead not justified for 4 tables — revisitable in Phase 2+). See ADR file: .project/decisions/2026-03-01-ADR002-why-sqlite.md

title: Electron-First — Build and validate the desktop kiosk before the cloud API
rationale: Solo developer with 90-day MVP deadline. The core value proposition is offline resilience — the kiosk must work without internet by definition. Building the Core first delivers zero tangible value to clients and creates pressure to couple the kiosk to network availability, undermining the offline-first architecture. The riskiest assumption is whether local billing accuracy and operator UX are correct — this must be validated first. The sync contract (api-contracts.md) and shared TS interfaces are documented now so the kiosk is built sync-ready (queue exists, payload shape is locked), but HTTP calls are deferred. Alternatives rejected: parallel development (not feasible solo), Core-first (wrong risk inversion). See ADR file: .project/decisions/2026-03-01-ADR001-why-electron-first.md

notes: Scaffold complete. electron-vite (main+preload+renderer), TypeScript strict, React 19 + Vite 7 + Tailwind v4 CSS-first, ESLint flat config with no-explicit-any error, Vitest 7/7 passing, electron-builder NSIS config. Build: 3 bundles compiled. Lint: clean. pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies configured for native builds.

better-sqlite3 singleton in src/main/database/connection.ts (no electron import — testable in Vitest). Custom migration runner with _migrations table, lexicographic sort, per-migration transactions. Schema: tariffs, sessions (tariff_snapshot JSON), sync_queue, app_config — WAL + foreign_keys ON. Repository pattern: BaseRepository + 4 concrete repos. Default tariff seeded on first run. 17 DB tests + 7 smoke = 24/24 passing, lint clean. ABI fix: pnpm rebuild for Vitest (Node ABI 127), pnpm rebuild:electron for packaging (Electron ABI 143). eslint-plugin-react-hooks peer warning suppressed via peerDependencyRules.

IPC foundation completa. src/shared/constants/ipc-channels.ts (IPC.DB.*, IPC.HW.*, IPC.APP.*), src/shared/types/result.ts (IpcResult<T>), ipc.ts virou re-export shim com compat alias IPC_CHANNELS. Handlers por domínio em src/main/ipc/ (db, hw stub, app). registerIpcHandlers() em src/main/ipc/index.ts chamado após initDatabase(). contextBridge expõe window.api.db.*, window.api.hw.*, window.api.app.*. window.d.ts totalmente tipado. 26/26 testes, lint e tsc --noEmit limpos. Commit: feat(ipc): typed context bridge — IPC constants, IpcResult<T>, domain handlers, window.api

App Shell completo. Tailwind v4 @theme com tokens brand/surface/danger/warning/success + baseline kiosk (min-width 1280px, overflow-x hidden). TanStack Router v1 com createRootRoute/createRoute, redirect / → /check-in, 4 rotas stub (check-in, sessions, history, tariffs). AppLayout com sidebar 56px + 4 NavItems com ícones SVG inline, active state via useRouterState, min-h touch-target 3rem. Componentes UI: Button (primary/danger/ghost, 3 sizes, loading state), Card+CardHeader+CardTitle, Badge (active/completed/canceled), Spinner+SpinnerOverlay, EmptyState. ErrorBoundary class component com reset handler. Toaster Sonner integrado em App.tsx com CSS vars para theming. tsc --noEmit limpo, ESLint limpo, 26/26 testes passando.

Tariff Engine completo. Identificada discrepância entre schema do DB (price_per_minute/grace_period_minutes/rounding_minutes) e o spec do tariff-engine.md (base_price/base_minutes/fraction model) — corrigido em migration 001, db.ts, seed.ts, tariff.repository.ts e database.test.ts antes da implementação da engine. tariff-engine.ts: TariffSnapshotSchema (Zod v4) com guard additional_fraction_minutes >= 1, calculateSessionTotal (integer-only, RangeError em checkout antes de checkin), calculateLiveCost. db.ts: Tariff interface atualizada, TariffSnapshot re-exportado do engine, parseTariffSnapshot usa Zod.parse (runtime safe). 30 novos testes cobrindo todas as tabelas de exemplos do doc, rounding edge cases, zero duration, RangeError, Zod invalid casos. 56/56 total tests, lint e tsc limpos.

TariffRepository.save() (upsert) + deactivate() soft-delete. IPC: GET_ALL_TARIFFS, SAVE_TARIFF, DEACTIVATE_TARIFF wired — Zod validation + "last active tariff" guard on Main side. currency.ts: rsToCents/centsToRs/formatRs. tariff-schema.ts: SaveTariffSchema + SaveTariffDto (shared between Main and Renderer). Preload + window.d.ts updated. TariffForm: controlled form, CurrencyInput mask (blur-format), NumberInput, Field, per-field blur validation, Zod submit guard. TariffCard: pricing detail grid, Desativar button (active only), deactivating loading state. TariffsPage: getAllTariffs on mount, inline form (create/edit), optimistic list update, toast on success/error. 56/56 tests, tsc clean, ESLint clean.

title: Shared Zod schema for IPC boundary validation (SaveTariffSchema)
rationale: Placed SaveTariffSchema in src/shared/utils/tariff-schema.ts so both the Main process IPC handler and the Renderer form can import the exact same validation rules. This eliminates the risk of main/renderer divergence and avoids duplicating error messages. The IPC handler uses safeParse on `unknown` input (the renderer could send anything), and the Renderer uses safeParse for per-field blur validation and pre-submit guard. Single source of truth for every constraint (min/max, integer, fraction_minutes >= 1).

notes: Session dashboard completo. Migration 002 adicionou guardian_name/guardian_contact (nullable) à tabela sessions. Session interface + CheckInDto + nova CheckOutRequestDto em db.ts. IPC channels: GET_ACTIVE_SESSIONS + CHECKOUT_SESSION. db.handler.ts: handlers com Zod validation, nowIso() no Main process, calculateSessionTotal com tariff_snapshot stored. Preload + window.d.ts atualizados. useSessionTimer hook: elapsedSeconds derivado de Date.now()-checkInAt (survives sleep/restart), formatHHMMSS, isOverTolerance, liveCost com recalc 60s. SessionCard: React.memo, guardian_name condicional, monospace HH:MM:SS, formatRs, warning colors, botões Check-Out (loading state) + Notificar (stub TASK-011) min-h-[3rem]. SessionsPage: load + 30s refresh via useRef pattern, set por sessão checkingOut, EmptyState, Spinner. 76/76 testes, tsc limpo, lint limpo.

CheckInRequestSchema em src/shared/utils/check-in-schema.ts (shared Main+Renderer, SoT único). SessionRepository.checkIn() refatorado para usar SQLite transaction que insere sessions + sync_queue atomicamente (offline-first contract). IPC CHECK_IN handler: Zod validation, tariff active guard, TARIFF_INACTIVE error code, UUID gerado no Main via randomUUID(), TariffSnapshotSchema.parse() para snapshot runtime-safe. Preload + window.d.ts atualizados com checkIn(dto: CheckInRequestDto). CheckInPage: 4 campos (child_name required, guardian_name required, guardian_contact optional, tariff_id select active-only), blur validation via .shape per-field, submit debounce 2s via useRef, toast + clear form + navigate /sessions on success, TARIFF_INACTIVE inline field error. Novo teste: atomically creates sync_queue on checkIn. 77/77 testes, tsc limpo, lint limpo.

CheckOutPage /sessions/$id/checkout com 2 steps: preview (billing summary + Confirmar + Cancelar Sessao + Voltar) e receipt (oferta de impressao pre-navegacao). db:preview-checkout: calculo read-only com CLOCK_ERROR guard. db:cancel-session: status=canceled + notes opcional, guarda WHERE status='open'. Migration 003: SQLite 12-step table-rename para extender CHECK constraint para 'canceled' + coluna notes TEXT NULL. SessionRepository.cancel() com WHERE status='open' guard. Preload + window.d.ts atualizados. SessionsPage.handleCheckOut agora navega para /sessions/$id/checkout (removido inline checkout + checkingOut Set state). 80/80 testes, tsc limpo, lint limpo.

title: Layout Redesign — Header + Two-Column Dashboard + Modal Forms
Customer DB — Clients, Guardians, and Phone Numbers
Payment Method + Transaction Number on Check-Out
History Page — Date Filter, Range Picker, Full Table
Settings Page — App Config via Gear Icon

text: Superseded by TASK-018 (History Page — Date Filter, Range Picker, Full Table), which expands scope to full date range filtering (Hoje, Ontem, 7 dias, Este Mes, customizado ate 90 dias) and a full table layout with payment method/transaction number columns. Do not start TASK-012 separately; implement TASK-018 instead and close this as duplicated.

notes: Migrations 004 (customers/guardians/guardian_phones tables) + 005 (sessions.customer_id FK). CustomerRepository (findById, findByName LIKE, findAll, findWithGuardians, save), GuardianRepository, GuardianPhoneRepository — all extending BaseRepository. IPC channels SEARCH_CUSTOMERS, GET_CUSTOMER, SAVE_CUSTOMER, SAVE_GUARDIAN, DELETE_GUARDIAN, SAVE_GUARDIAN_PHONE, DELETE_GUARDIAN_PHONE registered via customer.handler.ts. Preload + window.d.ts updated. Shared Zod schemas (SaveCustomerSchema, SaveGuardianSchema, SaveGuardianPhoneSchema, SearchCustomersSchema) + randomUUID renderer-safe shim. Dialog+DialogHeader UI component (native HTML dialog, backdrop click + Escape). CustomerModal with guardian/phone nested repeaters. CustomersPage with debounced search. CustomerAutocomplete in CheckInPage with pre-fill of child_name + guardian fields. Button 'outline' variant added. nav.customers added to AppLayout + router. 80/80 tests, tsc clean, lint clean.

Sidebar removed — replaced with fixed top header (KiosKids link, Novo Check-in button, HamburgerMenu dropdown for Histórico/Tarifas/Clientes, Settings gear icon placeholder). CheckInPage refactored to CheckInForm (modal-only, onSuccess+onCancel props, no navigate, no Card wrapper). AppLayout hosts CheckInModal (Dialog) and dispatches sessions:refresh event on success. SessionsPage rewritten as two-column dashboard: left panel = today's sessions table (all statuses, GET_TODAY_SESSIONS IPC), right panel = ActiveSessionCard list (countdown/overtime/beep) + InfoWidget (live clock, version, support). TariffForm unwrapped from Card — now used inside Dialog in TariffsPage. /check-in route removed; / redirects to /sessions. useSessionTimer extended with countdownSeconds, countdownDisplay, overtimeSeconds, overtimeDisplay. playBeep() Web Audio utility added. 80/80 tests, tsc clean, lint clean.
